---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new reviewer axis, runtime, or workflow improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What gap, friction, or limitation are you trying to address? Describe
the situation, not the solution.

## Proposed solution

What you would like to see. If this is a new reviewer axis, describe:

- The category of issues it would catch.
- Why existing reviewers do not catch them.
- Whether it requires execution or static-only review.

## Alternatives considered

What else have you considered? Why is this better?

## Additional context

Link related issues, prior art, or articles. Mention any constraints
(must work without network, must respect read-only contract, etc.).
